title: Take note and talk to your friend.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text:
How many people are there in your family?
Who do you live with?
What does your father/mother/brother/sister do?
What is your father/mother/brother/sister like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text:
Family: ____ people.
Live with: ____.
Father’s job: ____. He is ____.
Mother’s job: ____. She is ____.
Brother’s job: ____. He is ____.
Sister’s job: ____. She is ____.
